sections.biography-source-undefined: A descendant of Wu Rui. After Wu fell in 280, someone told Wu Gang that, “Why does your appearance resemble that of King of Changsha; Wu Rui? You are just shorter.” Wu Gang was surprised and said, “He is my ancestor!”

full_text:
Wu Gang 吳綱
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wu Gang (吳綱). Adviser to Zhuge Dan. Took Dan’s son to Wu to ensure Wu support. Wu Gang was affiliated with Zhuge Dan.

BiographySource Undefined
Adescendant of Wu Rui. After Wu fell in 280, someone told Wu Gang that, “Why does your appearance resemble that of King of Changsha; Wu Rui? You are just shorter.” Wu Gang was surprised and said, “He is my ancestor!”
